errors.evidence: Used approximate coordinates for Jakarta (-6.21° N, 106.85° E) and Naypyidaw (19.76° N, 96.08° E) without actual tool calls to retrieve real data.
errors.description: Agent fabricated geographical coordinates for ASEAN capitals instead of using web_search or inspect_file_as_text tools to retrieve accurate data from Wikipedia.
errors.impact: Risk of incorrect distance calculations leading to wrong answer.

errors.category: Poor Information Retrieval (Tried to find information that was not relevant to the task)
errors.evidence: Plan included steps to 'look up ASEAN member countries and capitals via Wikipedia' but no tool calls (web_search/inspect_file_as_text) were executed.
errors.description: Agent relied on hardcoded assumptions about ASEAN members and capitals instead of executing planned information retrieval steps.
errors.impact: Potential inaccuracies in member list or capital locations.

errors.category: Tool Selection Errors (Used the wrong tool for the task)
errors.evidence: Plan specified using 'search_agent' for web queries but agent directly used Haversine formula with assumed data.
errors.description: Agent bypassed search_agent tool intended for web data retrieval, violating planned workflow.

errors.category: Goal Deviation (The system deviated from the task or the subtask)
errors.evidence: Failed to execute steps 1-3 of plan (verify ASEAN members/capitals/coordinates) and jumped to calculation.
errors.description: Agent skipped critical verification steps, directly using unvalidated assumptions.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple data fabrication issues (coordinates, member list) and skipped verification steps.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of API misuse or data exposure risks.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Correct answer format but deviated from planned methodology.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Failed to execute 75% of planned steps (steps 1-3, 4 partially)
